states.name: Kojiro
states.title: Wandering Swordmaster
states.description: Rumor has it that a certain gang of thieves has hired an exceptional swordmaster as their guard. Swinging a longsword with unprecedented ease and cutting opponents down without as much as a single sound, she strikes fear in the hearts of those who would rather see the gang gone.

states.name: Kojiro
states.title: Wandering Swordmaster
states.description: Kojiro Sasaki was born into a samurai household. After the untimely death of her mother, she lived alone with her father, whose forced retirement from the way of the warrior due to an injury prompted him to put all his unfulfilled dreams onto his daughter's shoulders. His fixation with raising the perfect swordsman resulted in extreme strictness, which kept young Kojiro constantly discouraged instead of motivating her.

states.name: Kojiro
states.title: Wandering Swordmaster
states.description: Kojiro had always thought of her own sword skills as disgraceful—her father's words, outweighing any praise she'd ever received from others and always holding her back. But there were actually other words hidden beneath them, carved deep into her heart—once she rediscovered those, her potential was finally unleashed.
